title: Privacy Commissioner of Canada v. SWIFT Executive Summary
summary: On June 23, 2006, an article appeared in the New York Times (and elsewhere), alleging that the US Department of the Treasury (UST) used administrative subpoenas to access tens of thousands of records from SWIFT SCRL (Society for Worldwide Interbank Financial Telecommunication). After determining the extent to which it could get involved,...
dedupKey: privacy commissioner of canada v swift executive summary|2007-04-02
